stories.title: Javier Ruiz entrevista este jueves a Zapatero en Mañaneros: la primera vez que se sienta en un plató tras su imputación
stories.summary: Former Spanish Prime Minister Jose Luis Rodriguez Zapatero will break his silence in his first live TV interview since being investigated in the Plus Ultra case. The interview with RTVE's Javier Ruiz will take place on Thursday at 13:00 hours in the Mañaneros 360 program. Zapatero has been under investigation since May 19 and this is his first public appearance since then. The interview comes two days after Zapatero's friend, Julio Martinez, implicated him in the case during a court appearance.

stories.title: Iris si presenterà al falò nella sesta puntata di “Temptation Island 2026”? Tutte le anticipazioni
stories.summary: Andrea, a participant on Temptation Island 2026, has requested a confrontation with his girlfriend Iris, which will take place in the show's sixth episode. The episode airs on Wednesday, July 22, at 21:30, and will feature the couples making difficult decisions about their relationships. Iris has been struggling with Andrea's infidelity, and the confrontation will determine their future together. The outcome of this confrontation will be revealed in the episode.

stories.title: World Matchplay Darts LIVE! Updates, video, analysis, scores, commentary with Gerwyn Price, James Wade, Gian van Veen in action
stories.summary: The 2026 World Matchplay Darts is underway at Winter Gardens in Blackpool, with 32 players competing in the tournament. Luke Littler, the defending champion and teenage world number one, is seeking to win his second consecutive title. The event is one of the Professional Darts Corporation's eight major events, with a prize money structure yet to be disclosed. The women's event will be held on the final day of the tournament on Sunday, July 26.

stories.title: Temptation Island, chi è il single Marco Fatata: età, lavoro, vita privata e il rapporto (sempre più stretto) con Francesca
stories.summary: Francesca Coppola, una delle partecipanti a Temptation Island 2026, ha sviluppato una vicinanza con il single Marco Fatata, creando una dinamica inaspettata nel villaggio. La 31enne romana, fidanzata con Danilo, si è lasciata andare a abbracci e carezze con Marco, causando disagio al suo partner. La situazione è culminata con la decisione di Francesca di lasciare il villaggio per raggiungere Danilo, dopo essere stata travolta dal senso di colpa.

stories.title: ‘Terrifying’: Woman says landlord was hiding behind wall of Wexford holiday home
stories.summary: A woman and her family were left terrified after discovering a landlord hiding behind a wall in a Co Wexford holiday home they had rented through Booking.com. The incident occurred last weekend when Therese and her family returned from a family party to find the landlord behind the wall. Booking.com has launched an investigation into the incident and has suspended the property until the investigation is completed. The family's booking was for the entire property, which was advertised as not being owner-occupied.

stories.title: INFO BFMTV. Menaces contre le maire d'Alès: des personnes cagoulées se revendiquant de la DZ Mafia se disent "en aucun cas responsables"
stories.summary: Menaces de mort ont été adressées au maire d'Alès par des personnes se revendiquant de la DZ Mafia, dans une vidéo où ils déclarent ne pas être responsables de ces menaces. Cette vidéo a été jugée crédible par une source proche du dossier. Le maire d'Alès est la deuxième personnalité française à recevoir de telles menaces après Amine Kessaci, un élu de Marseille qui a déjà été victime de menaces. Les autorités doivent maintenant enquêter sur ces menaces et garantir la sécurité du maire.

stories.title: "Je n'ai plus aucun intérêt, maintenant, à dissimuler où se trouve le corps": Cédric Jubillar a dessiné un croquis pour retrouver Delphine
stories.summary: Cédric Jubillar, 39 ans, a révélé l’emplacement du corps de son épouse Delphine, disparue il y a cinq ans et demi, en dessinant un croquis le 15 juillet devant la cour d’assises de Haute-Garonne. Les ossements de la victime ont été retrouvés dans un champ à Mailhoc (Tarn), mais les fouilles, menées par une centaine de gendarmes avec chiens et drones, sont désormais stoppées faute de nouveaux éléments. Jubillar a expliqué avoir transporté le corps au point mort pour éviter de réveiller les voisins. Les recherches se concentrent désormais sur l’analyse des aveux et du croquis.

stories.title: Mario Calabresi valuta una possibile candidatura a sindaco di Milano
stories.summary: Mario Calabresi, giornalista e scrittore, sta valutando una candidatura a sindaco di Milano. Lo ha confermato lui stesso durante un incontro alla Festa dell’Unità di Vizzolo Predabissi il 22 luglio 2026. Calabresi ha dichiarato di essere in attesa di capire il percorso decisionale, che sarà definito dopo l’estate. La sua decisione definitiva dipenderà dagli sviluppi organizzativi delle prossime elezioni amministrative.

stories.title: Llegó a la Argentina el nuevo nuncio de la Santa Sede y comienza una etapa decisiva para la visita del papa León XIV
stories.summary: The new Vatican ambassador to Argentina, Monsignor Michael Banach, arrived in the country on Wednesday, marking a decisive stage in preparations for Pope Leon XIV's potential visit. The visit could take place during the second week of November. Banach will coordinate with the Argentine government and the Catholic Church to finalize the trip. The Vatican representative will present his credentials to President Javier Milei in the coming days.

stories.title: laSexta emite ‘Lo que la verdad esconde: el caso Asunta’ mañana miércoles en Prime Time
stories.summary: LaSexta airs all three episodes of the documentary Lo que la verdad esconde: el caso Asunta this Wednesday, July 22, at 11:00 PM, revisiting the 2013 murder of 12-year-old Asunta Basterra in Santiago de Compostela. The series, based on over 100 interviews, examines the controversial conviction of her adoptive parents, Rosario Porto and Alfonso Basterra, sentenced to 18 years in prison. The case, one of Spain’s most scrutinized, remains unresolved regarding motive. The documentary explores legal and media dynamics surrounding the trial.

stories.title: Love Island fans ‘work out’ real reason Julia kicked off at Jasmine - and it’s not jealousy over Lorenzo
stories.summary: Love Island fans believe Julia confronted Jasmine over Lorenzo after a clip showed him suggesting they "couple up." Julia accused Jasmine of being untrustworthy, including failing to tell Priya about rumors behind her back. Earlier interviews with ex-islanders Sean and Lola confirmed no romantic feelings between Lorenzo and Jasmine. The confrontation airs tonight as part of ongoing villa drama.

stories.title: Bruno Fernandes makes Man Utd transfer decision as '£400k-a-week deal on offer'
stories.summary: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes has agreed to extend his stay at Old Trafford, committing to a new £400,000-a-week deal before the end of July. The 31-year-old midfielder, fresh off a record 21 Premier League assists last season, will return for pre-season training next week after Portugal’s World Cup exit. United’s wage structure is reportedly being adjusted to finalize the agreement, ending months of speculation over his future. The club now aims to build around their talisman as they prepare for the new campaign.

stories.title: One Piece 1189 : le prochain chapitre a leaké, ça va faire mal pour les Chapeaux de Paille
stories.summary: Luffy is severely wounded after a brutal clash with Imu in One Piece chapter 1189. Imu wields a new weapon, the Sea God Sword, piercing Luffy and pinning him against a tree. The chapter releases July 23 digitally and July 26 in print. Usopp senses something dire as allies struggle against the World Government’s forces.

stories.title: El precio de la luz desciende el jueves 23 de julio: estas son las franjas más económicas del día
stories.summary: El precio mayorista de la luz en España cayó un 9% este jueves 23 de julio, situándose en 136,73 euros por megavatio hora según OMIE. La franja más económica del día será de 15:00 a 16:00 horas, con un coste de 76,85 euros/MWh. El horario más caro se registrará entre las 20:00 y 21:00 horas, alcanzando 381,3 euros/MWh. Red Eléctrica publicará el precio final de la tarifa PVPC antes de las 20:30 horas.

stories.title: MUTINY- Jason Statham is Ready to Turn the Tide with a New Poster for His Latest Visceral Thriller that Pays Homage to an Action Classic!
stories.summary: Jason Statham stars in the upcoming action thriller Mutiny, set to release exclusively in theaters on August 21, 2026. Directed by Jean-François Richet, the film follows Cole Reed, a former Special Forces operative framed for murder after his boss is killed. Reed’s quest for vengeance leads him aboard a cargo ship, uncovering an international conspiracy. The trailer showcases Statham’s signature high-octane action in a confined setting.

stories.title: Chi è la single Giulia Colacchi di Tempration Island 2026?
stories.summary: Giulia Colacchi, 24 anni, romana, è entrata nel cast delle single di Temptation Island 2026 e ha subito attirato l’attenzione di Danilo, fidanzato da quattro anni con Francesca. Ex finalista regionale a Miss Italia 2025 e modella, Colacchi ha avuto una relazione con il tentatore Igor Zeetti. Le immagini del loro avvicinamento nel villaggio hanno scatenato tensioni tra la coppia. Ora si attende la reazione di Francesca nella prossima puntata.

stories.title: Ryanair Spain flight suffers 'technical issue' and met by emergency services
stories.summary: A Ryanair flight from Malaga to Edinburgh experienced a minor technical issue, prompting the crew to issue a 7700 emergency code and alerting emergency services on the tarmac. The plane landed safely at Edinburgh Airport on July 22. Passengers disembarked normally and the aircraft was inspected by engineers. The incident is under investigation.

stories.title: Musetti, Fils e Draper: ultima chiamata verso New York
stories.summary: Three Italian tennis stars—Lorenzo Musetti, Jannik Sinner, and Jack Draper—face crucial matches at the ATP 500 in Washington starting July 27 to secure rankings points before the US Open swing. Musetti, returning after a left thigh injury that forced him to miss Roland Garros and Wimbledon, drops to No. 14 in the ATP rankings. The tournament’s fast hard courts and 30°C heat favor adaptation, but tough opponents like top-10 Alex de Minaur and home favorites Frances Tiafoe await. A strong showing could ease their paths to New York.

stories.title: Hiker injured in ‘surprise encounter’ with bear on brushy South Anchorage trail
stories.summary: A woman was injured in a bear encounter on a South Anchorage trail on July 18, 2026. The hiker, with another person and three dogs, was on a narrow trail near Bear Valley when a brown bear made brief contact before leaving. First responders used a drone to monitor the bear during the rescue. The woman was hospitalized with non-life-threatening injuries.
sources: ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

stories.title: Contact with his agent has begun.. Paris Saint-Germain star is "Al-Hilal's new surprise" in the summer transfer window
stories.summary: Al-Hilal has reportedly begun talks with Ousmane Dembélé’s agent about a potential summer transfer. The Saudi Pro League club views the 28-year-old PSG winger as a priority target. PSG aims to retain Dembélé, offering a new contract amid intense Saudi interest. A deal remains uncertain as negotiations progress.

stories.title: Man, 30s, dies after being struck by van in Co Kilkenny
stories.summary: A man in his 30s died after being struck by a van on the R693 near Arigan Bridge, Cooleshal, Freshford, Co Kilkenny, at 9.30am on Wednesday, 22 July 2026. He was pronounced dead at the scene and taken to University Hospital Waterford for a post-mortem. The road was temporarily closed but has since reopened. Gardaí are appealing for witnesses or dash-cam footage from drivers traveling Freshford to Kilkenny between 9am and 9.30am.

stories.title: Incendie d’Arès : 120 sapeurs-pompiers mobilisés dans la nuit de dimanche à lundi, la piste criminelle est envisagée
stories.summary: A wildfire broke out in Arès, Gironde, in the early hours of Monday, July 20, 2026, scorching 2.6 hectares of pine forest. Over 120 firefighters responded, preventing further spread to surrounding areas. Investigators suspect arson after identifying multiple ignition points and have launched an inquiry. Authorities continue to assess the damage and potential causes.

stories.title: Google earnings live updates: Alphabet's AI outlook, cloud growth in focus
stories.summary: Google's parent company Alphabet has increased its 2026 spending forecast to as much as $205 billion, driven by investments in artificial intelligence and cloud growth. This marks a significant jump from previous estimates. Google is also scaling its AI business, dedicating resources to its Gemini 4 model and planning to release new models almost every month. The company's AI outlook and cloud growth are now in focus as it executes on its extraordinary potential.

stories.title: World Cup 2026: Argentina react to final defeat and Messi questions
stories.summary: Argentina's World Cup campaign ended in a 1-0 defeat to Spain in extra time on Sunday in New Jersey, with midfielder Enzo Fernandez sent off for two yellow cards. The match was marred by ugly scenes, including Fernandez's red card and a brawl. Despite the loss, Fernandez praised the team for representing Argentina with "pride" and "humility". FIFA has launched an investigation into the team's behavior after the final.

stories.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
stories.summary: Tesla reported weaker-than-expected earnings for the second quarter, with earnings per share at 33 cents adjusted, missing the 51 cents expected by analysts. Revenue reached $28.24 billion, exceeding the $25.71 billion estimate. The company's net income fell 5% to $1.11 billion. Tesla's stock price slid almost 3% in extended trading, following a 17% decline for the year.

stories.title: Searle in bid to reach quarter-finals of World Matchplay this evening
stories.summary: Tonight, Ryan Searle faces James Wade in Round Two of the World Matchplay at the Winter Gardens in Blackpool. Searle beat William O'Connor 10-6 in the opening round, while Wade won 10-7 against Jermaine Wattimena. The winner will move closer to a potential quarter-final match against World No 1 Luke Littler. Littler is seeking to become the first player since 2017 to win back-to-back titles in Blackpool.

stories.title: Has Trump dragged the US into a forever war in Iran? | Mohamad Bazzi
stories.summary: A US-Iran ceasefire negotiated by President Trump has collapsed, plunging the region into uncertainty. The agreement, which was reached in November 2024, has failed, raising concerns of a prolonged conflict. The US has been involved in a war with Iran for nearly five months, with no end in sight. The collapse of the ceasefire has significant implications for regional stability and global security.

stories.title: Hello Sunshine’s Head of TV and Film on 10 Years of Reese Witherspoon’s Production Company, ‘Big Little Lies’ Season 3, Apple’s ‘Lucky’ and More ‘Elle’
stories.summary: Reese Witherspoon's production company, Hello Sunshine, is releasing two high-profile shows in quick succession. A prequel series "Elle" to "Legally Blonde" is debuting on Amazon's Prime Video in July, while the action miniseries "Lucky" starring Anya Taylor-Joy will premiere on Apple TV. Both shows are produced by Hello Sunshine. The back-to-back releases mark a significant milestone for the company.

stories.title: CSD gegen Dyke* March, Trans Pride gegen ITP, CSD gegen IQP: Drag March und Nahostkonflikt spalten die Szene
stories.summary: A lesbian visibility march, the Dyke March, is facing competition from a rival event, the Drag March, and the Christopher Street Day parade in Berlin. The Dyke March, which has taken place since 2013, is scheduled for Friday evening, while the Drag March and CSD parade will also start on Friday. The Dyke March organizers see the Drag March as an attack on lesbian visibility. The events are expected to draw large crowds in the Kreuzberg neighborhood.

stories.title: ‘The Odyssey’ Screenplay Is Now Available to Buy Online
stories.summary: Christopher Nolan's screenplay for "The Odyssey" is now available for purchase online, priced at $13.95 for a 240-page paperback. The film, which stars Matt Damon, has collected $124.5 million domestically and $264.1 million worldwide since its release. The screenplay offers a closer look at Nolan's adaptation of Homer's Greek poem, including dialogue and scene descriptions. The official release date is August 4.

stories.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
stories.summary: The US has signed a landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia, allowing the kingdom to enrich uranium on its soil at a US-built facility. The deal, worth billions of dollars, will advance US and regional security by upholding high nuclear safety and nonproliferation standards. The agreement will involve US companies building a facility to produce enriched uranium, which can be used as fuel for power plants. The deal is expected to strengthen the US's competitive edge in civil nuclear technology.

stories.title: Liverpool confident of signing Barcola - Thursday's gossip
stories.summary: Liverpool is confident of signing Paris St-Germain forward Bradley Barcola, a 23-year-old who impressed with four goal contributions at the World Cup with France this summer. The Reds aim to beat Arsenal and Bayern Munich to the signature. Barcola's potential move to Liverpool comes as Arsenal is also interested in the player. A decision on the transfer is expected in the coming weeks.

stories.title: Darren Aronofsky’s AI Studio Primordial Soup Raising $15 Million
stories.summary: Darren Aronofsky's AI studio Primordial Soup is seeking to raise $15 million in cash through a Securities and Exchange Commission filing. The studio, launched a year ago, has already sold over $11 million in equity this month. As part of its expansion, Primordial Soup is hiring a "Head of Studio" and multiple "Generative Artists" to work on AI-focused projects. The studio's efforts underscore Aronofsky's ambitions in the AI space, following its partnership with Google's DeepMind unit to produce short films.

stories.title: BBC I, Jack Wright ending explained as season one ends on cliffhanger
stories.summary: A murder mystery unfolds in the BBC series I, Jack Wright, as the season one finale ends on a cliffhanger. DCI Morgan charges a suspect in the murder of high-powered businessman Jack Wright, but multiple arrests follow, with all claiming innocence. The final episode reveals a confession from an unlikely candidate. The drama's fate remains uncertain as the season concludes with a series of twists and turns.

stories.title: Harcèlement, misogynie : Un labo du CNRS aux pratiques de boys club
stories.summary: A French CNRS researcher, Fabien Jobard, has been suspended for five years from the Association française de science politique due to two alleged misconducts related to harassment and sexism. The incidents occurred at the 2024 conference in Grenoble. Jobard, a sociologist studying police behavior, was also the president of the Observatoire français des drogues et des tendances addictives. He will be barred from participating in association events during his suspension.

stories.title: Fire kills 10 members of same family in Peru, police say
stories.summary: A devastating fire in Lima, Peru, has claimed the lives of 10 members of the same family, including five children, and two others were injured. The blaze occurred at a home in the La Victoria district early Wednesday, with 17 family members present at the time. Five children and four adults were killed, with seven family members managing to escape. Police are investigating reports that the fire was started by arsonists.

stories.title: Heatwaves caused by fall in pollution
stories.summary: Britain's scorching heatwaves are being driven by a significant drop in pollution, with temperatures in Europe warming twice as much as the rest of the world since the 1980s. The continent is now 2.3C warmer than in the pre-industrial era, with the global average warming by 1.3C. This steep temperature rise has led to an increase in deadly heatwaves. Experts are now studying the link between cleaner skies and the resulting heat increase.

stories.title: Conservatives Parrot A Victimhood Script Written By Barack Obama
stories.summary: Former US President Barack Obama's campaign speech in Norfolk, Virginia, on November 1, 2025, has been criticized for promoting a victimhood narrative. Obama campaigned for Democratic gubernatorial candidate Abigail Spanberger, who faces Republican candidate Winsome Earle-Sears in the November 4 election. According to reports, Obama's speech was part of a larger effort to mobilize Democratic voters. The outcome of the election will determine the future of Virginia's statewide offices.

stories.title: Miami mistakenly post James 'introductory' video
stories.summary: Miami Heat mistakenly posted a link to LeBron James' introductory press conference on YouTube, scheduled for July 27, before deleting it. The error occurred as staff prepared for the possibility of James joining the team. James, a 41-year-old 22-time All-Star, is considering a return to the Heat after leaving the Los Angeles Lakers in June. The team is looking to bolster its lineup with James alongside new signings Giannis Antetokounmpo and Bam Adebayo.

stories.title: Pogacar fears a day like Adam Yates' at the Tour de France
stories.summary: Tadej Pogacar maintained his lead in the general classification at the Tour de France after the 17th stage, where he and teammate Isaac del Toro had few problems. Adam Yates' performance, however, raised concerns as he appeared to come to a complete standstill for a brief moment before teammate Tim Wellens helped him to the finish. Pogacar remains in first place, with del Toro in third. The Slovenian leader will face a challenging stage ahead.

stories.title: AD-columnist doet voorspelling en wijst naar PSV: 'Maar het ligt heel dicht bij elkaar'
stories.summary: PSV is expected to win its fourth consecutive Dutch league title in the 2026/2027 season, having secured the championship with a record 19-point lead last season. The team's chances are expected to be challenged by Feyenoord, with AD-columnist Hugo Borst predicting a more competitive title race. Maurice Steijn, former coach of Sparta Rotterdam, also expressed confidence in Feyenoord's chances, citing the team's young talent, including Sem Steijn, the son of Maurice. The new season is set to begin with high expectations for both teams.

stories.title: Captain Salt leads Fire to victory against Brave
stories.summary: Welsh Fire captain Phil Salt led his team to a six-wicket victory against Southern Brave in Southampton, scoring an unbeaten 47. This win marks the beginning of the 2026 Hundred season for Fire, who finished bottom of the table last season. Salt is the all-time leading scorer in The Hundred, having hit 1,138 runs in five seasons. Fire will look to build momentum in their title bid.

stories.title: Alphabet Quadruples Profit to Nearly $120 Billion, Fueled by A.I. Investments
stories.summary: Alphabet, parent company of Google, reported a record profit of nearly $120 billion for the three months ending in June, a 24 percent increase from the previous year. The surge is largely attributed to investments in artificial intelligence, with Google's cloud business seeing an 82 percent revenue growth to $24.8 billion. This quadrupled Alphabet's profit to $112.1 billion, fueled by investments in A.I.-related companies like SpaceX and Anthropic. The company's A.I. investments are expected to continue driving growth in the coming months.

stories.title: Tesla’s revenues are bouncing back, but profits are still weak
stories.summary: Tesla reported a 25 percent increase in vehicle deliveries to 480,126 units in the second quarter of 2026, exceeding revenue expectations with $28.2 billion in revenue. The company's net income was $1.11 billion, a 5 percent increase from the same period last year. Despite this, profits remain weak compared to revenue growth. Tesla's focus on delivering vehicles will likely continue as it aims to transform into a leader in AI and robotics.

stories.title: Vorschau: Murdoch Mysteries (S09/E09) • Der Baby-Tag (Murdoch Mysteries - Baby Day)
stories.summary: Detective William Murdoch takes out a loan to build a house for Julia, but soon discovers that someone has stolen money and printing plates for counterfeit banknotes. The theft threatens to destabilize the economy as the fake bills are nearly indistinguishable from real ones. Inspector Thomas Brackenreid recognizes the severity of the crime's impact on Murdoch's reputation. As Murdoch and his assistant George Crabtree investigate, the circle of suspects tightens.

stories.title: The millennial generation has split, new Fed research shows: those over 35 are edging toward boomer-style wealth, while everyone else falls behind
stories.summary: According to new research from the Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis, the US homeownership rate has a significant age-based split, with those over 35 edging toward boomer-style wealth, while those under 35 fall behind. The actual homeownership rate is around 53%, compared to the reported 65%. For adults under 35, the true homeownership rate is just 22%. This disparity suggests a widening wealth gap between generations.

stories.title: Microsoft brings original Xbox backward compatibility to Windows PCs
stories.summary: Microsoft is expanding its Xbox backward compatibility to Windows PCs, with four original Xbox titles now playable on PC for the first time. The titles, including BLiNX: The Time Sweeper and Conker: Live and Reloaded, are available for download at $10 or for free with an Xbox Game Pass subscription. PC players can also access the games with existing digital licenses. This move enables bonus graphical features like Vsync support and up to 4x resolution scaling.

stories.title: House Republicans Pass Stock Trading Bill Tied to SAVE Act and Voter ID Measure
stories.summary: The measure has drawn bipartisan backing amid a public outcry against the practice, but Democrats opposed it after Republicans added a voter ID requirement.

stories.title: House Adopts $95 Billion G.O.P. Budget for Iran War
stories.summary: Republican leaders muscled through resistance in their own ranks to approve the budget blueprint, but its prospects were far dimmer in the Senate.

stories.title: ISPs' long nightmare of having to list all the fees they charge is finally over
stories.summary: The Federal Communications Commission has eliminated a requirement for internet service providers to list all additional fees on their broadband price labels. This change affects over 700 internet service providers. The FCC cited concerns that cluttered labels were no longer serving as a useful shopping tool. The decision is effective immediately, allowing ISPs to simplify their billing practices.

stories.title: House Passes Defense Bill Amid Iran War Divide
stories.summary: Republicans pushed through the $1.15 trillion bill over opposition from Democrats, who said backing it was akin to embracing the war.

stories.title: Price-hiked iPads are a little cheaper right now
stories.summary: A premium iPad model is currently discounted at various retailers. The 13-inch iPad Pro M5 with 512GB of storage is available for $1,549.99, a $150 savings from its original price of $1,699. Additionally, the 11-inch iPad Air M3 with 1TB of storage and optional 5G is marked down to $749, a $500 discount from its suggested retail price.

stories.title: Louvre Gallery Reopens After Brazen Jewel Heist
stories.summary: Thieves stole crown jewels from the Apollo Gallery at the Louvre Museum in October, forcing its closure. Tourists finally returned on Wednesday.

stories.title: Three Airports Plan to Ditch T.S.A. Amid Push for Private Security
stories.summary: The airports have opted in to the agency’s new security model, an agency spokesperson confirmed on Wednesday. A union official said the move could jeopardize public safety.

stories.title: NASA to Showcase Agency’s Newest Wind Tunnel in Virginia
stories.summary: NASA will showcase its newest wind tunnel, the Flight Dynamics Research Facility, at the Langley Research Center in Hampton, Virginia, on July 31. The facility is the agency's first new wind tunnel in over 40 years. The event will include a ribbon-cutting ceremony and media availability with NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman and other officials. The wind tunnel is a major milestone in NASA's evolution and will be used for research and development.

stories.title: What Were the Lotus-Eaters Eating?
stories.summary: In Homer’s epic, Odysseus’s men eat something so powerful that they forget about home. Which plants could have produced such a soporific, narcotic and amnesiac effect?

stories.title: Donald Trump Jr.’s Investment Firm Posts Staggering Returns of 200%
stories.summary: The fledgling firm, run by the president’s oldest son and his partner Omeed Malik, has made investments in A.I. and defense technology that have tripled in value in just months.

stories.title: Global Oil Price Jumps as War Threats Intensify
stories.summary: But stock investors shrug off Iran developments as they await crucial earnings reports from tech firms including Alphabet and Tesla.

stories.title: Target ultra-processed food to reduce obesity in Britain | Letter
stories.summary: A British health select committee report finds that obesity is an engineered outcome, not a result of individual willpower. The report highlights a flaw in decades of British food policy, specifically the "high in fat, salt or sugar" framework, which unfairly targets fat as a primary driver of weight gain and type 2 diabetes. The evidence suggests sugar and refined carbohydrates are the main culprits, with salt playing a secondary role. The committee recommends targeting ultra-processed foods to reduce obesity in Britain.

stories.title: Government Overhauls Teen Pregnancy Program to Focus on Marriage and Starting Families
stories.summary: The administration canceled federal grants to organizations across the country, accusing them of encouraging premarital sex. New criteria say programs should stress abstinence.

offbeat.title: Javier Ruiz entrevista este jueves a Zapatero en Mañaneros: la primera vez que se sienta en un plató tras su imputación
offbeat.summary: Former Spanish Prime Minister Jose Luis Rodriguez Zapatero will break his silence in his first live TV interview since being investigated in the Plus Ultra case. The interview with RTVE's Javier Ruiz will take place on Thursday at 13:00 hours in the Mañaneros 360 program. Zapatero has been under investigation since May 19 and this is his first public appearance since then. The interview comes two days after Zapatero's friend, Julio Martinez, implicated him in the case during a court appearance.

offbeat.title: Iris si presenterà al falò nella sesta puntata di “Temptation Island 2026”? Tutte le anticipazioni
offbeat.summary: Andrea, a participant on Temptation Island 2026, has requested a confrontation with his girlfriend Iris, which will take place in the show's sixth episode. The episode airs on Wednesday, July 22, at 21:30, and will feature the couples making difficult decisions about their relationships. Iris has been struggling with Andrea's infidelity, and the confrontation will determine their future together. The outcome of this confrontation will be revealed in the episode.

offbeat.title: World Matchplay Darts LIVE! Updates, video, analysis, scores, commentary with Gerwyn Price, James Wade, Gian van Veen in action
offbeat.summary: The 2026 World Matchplay Darts is underway at Winter Gardens in Blackpool, with 32 players competing in the tournament. Luke Littler, the defending champion and teenage world number one, is seeking to win his second consecutive title. The event is one of the Professional Darts Corporation's eight major events, with a prize money structure yet to be disclosed. The women's event will be held on the final day of the tournament on Sunday, July 26.

offbeat.title: Temptation Island, chi è il single Marco Fatata: età, lavoro, vita privata e il rapporto (sempre più stretto) con Francesca
offbeat.summary: Francesca Coppola, una delle partecipanti a Temptation Island 2026, ha sviluppato una vicinanza con il single Marco Fatata, creando una dinamica inaspettata nel villaggio. La 31enne romana, fidanzata con Danilo, si è lasciata andare a abbracci e carezze con Marco, causando disagio al suo partner. La situazione è culminata con la decisione di Francesca di lasciare il villaggio per raggiungere Danilo, dopo essere stata travolta dal senso di colpa.

offbeat.title: ‘Terrifying’: Woman says landlord was hiding behind wall of Wexford holiday home
offbeat.summary: A woman and her family were left terrified after discovering a landlord hiding behind a wall in a Co Wexford holiday home they had rented through Booking.com. The incident occurred last weekend when Therese and her family returned from a family party to find the landlord behind the wall. Booking.com has launched an investigation into the incident and has suspended the property until the investigation is completed. The family's booking was for the entire property, which was advertised as not being owner-occupied.

offbeat.title: INFO BFMTV. Menaces contre le maire d'Alès: des personnes cagoulées se revendiquant de la DZ Mafia se disent "en aucun cas responsables"
offbeat.summary: Menaces de mort ont été adressées au maire d'Alès par des personnes se revendiquant de la DZ Mafia, dans une vidéo où ils déclarent ne pas être responsables de ces menaces. Cette vidéo a été jugée crédible par une source proche du dossier. Le maire d'Alès est la deuxième personnalité française à recevoir de telles menaces après Amine Kessaci, un élu de Marseille qui a déjà été victime de menaces. Les autorités doivent maintenant enquêter sur ces menaces et garantir la sécurité du maire.

offbeat.title: "Je n'ai plus aucun intérêt, maintenant, à dissimuler où se trouve le corps": Cédric Jubillar a dessiné un croquis pour retrouver Delphine
offbeat.summary: Cédric Jubillar, 39 ans, a révélé l’emplacement du corps de son épouse Delphine, disparue il y a cinq ans et demi, en dessinant un croquis le 15 juillet devant la cour d’assises de Haute-Garonne. Les ossements de la victime ont été retrouvés dans un champ à Mailhoc (Tarn), mais les fouilles, menées par une centaine de gendarmes avec chiens et drones, sont désormais stoppées faute de nouveaux éléments. Jubillar a expliqué avoir transporté le corps au point mort pour éviter de réveiller les voisins. Les recherches se concentrent désormais sur l’analyse des aveux et du croquis.

offbeat.title: Mario Calabresi valuta una possibile candidatura a sindaco di Milano
offbeat.summary: Mario Calabresi, giornalista e scrittore, sta valutando una candidatura a sindaco di Milano. Lo ha confermato lui stesso durante un incontro alla Festa dell’Unità di Vizzolo Predabissi il 22 luglio 2026. Calabresi ha dichiarato di essere in attesa di capire il percorso decisionale, che sarà definito dopo l’estate. La sua decisione definitiva dipenderà dagli sviluppi organizzativi delle prossime elezioni amministrative.

offbeat.title: Llegó a la Argentina el nuevo nuncio de la Santa Sede y comienza una etapa decisiva para la visita del papa León XIV
offbeat.summary: The new Vatican ambassador to Argentina, Monsignor Michael Banach, arrived in the country on Wednesday, marking a decisive stage in preparations for Pope Leon XIV's potential visit. The visit could take place during the second week of November. Banach will coordinate with the Argentine government and the Catholic Church to finalize the trip. The Vatican representative will present his credentials to President Javier Milei in the coming days.

offbeat.title: laSexta emite ‘Lo que la verdad esconde: el caso Asunta’ mañana miércoles en Prime Time
offbeat.summary: LaSexta airs all three episodes of the documentary Lo que la verdad esconde: el caso Asunta this Wednesday, July 22, at 11:00 PM, revisiting the 2013 murder of 12-year-old Asunta Basterra in Santiago de Compostela. The series, based on over 100 interviews, examines the controversial conviction of her adoptive parents, Rosario Porto and Alfonso Basterra, sentenced to 18 years in prison. The case, one of Spain’s most scrutinized, remains unresolved regarding motive. The documentary explores legal and media dynamics surrounding the trial.

offbeat.title: Love Island fans ‘work out’ real reason Julia kicked off at Jasmine - and it’s not jealousy over Lorenzo
offbeat.summary: Love Island fans believe Julia confronted Jasmine over Lorenzo after a clip showed him suggesting they "couple up." Julia accused Jasmine of being untrustworthy, including failing to tell Priya about rumors behind her back. Earlier interviews with ex-islanders Sean and Lola confirmed no romantic feelings between Lorenzo and Jasmine. The confrontation airs tonight as part of ongoing villa drama.

offbeat.title: Bruno Fernandes makes Man Utd transfer decision as '£400k-a-week deal on offer'
offbeat.summary: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes has agreed to extend his stay at Old Trafford, committing to a new £400,000-a-week deal before the end of July. The 31-year-old midfielder, fresh off a record 21 Premier League assists last season, will return for pre-season training next week after Portugal’s World Cup exit. United’s wage structure is reportedly being adjusted to finalize the agreement, ending months of speculation over his future. The club now aims to build around their talisman as they prepare for the new campaign.

offbeat.title: One Piece 1189 : le prochain chapitre a leaké, ça va faire mal pour les Chapeaux de Paille
offbeat.summary: Luffy is severely wounded after a brutal clash with Imu in One Piece chapter 1189. Imu wields a new weapon, the Sea God Sword, piercing Luffy and pinning him against a tree. The chapter releases July 23 digitally and July 26 in print. Usopp senses something dire as allies struggle against the World Government’s forces.

offbeat.title: El precio de la luz desciende el jueves 23 de julio: estas son las franjas más económicas del día
offbeat.summary: El precio mayorista de la luz en España cayó un 9% este jueves 23 de julio, situándose en 136,73 euros por megavatio hora según OMIE. La franja más económica del día será de 15:00 a 16:00 horas, con un coste de 76,85 euros/MWh. El horario más caro se registrará entre las 20:00 y 21:00 horas, alcanzando 381,3 euros/MWh. Red Eléctrica publicará el precio final de la tarifa PVPC antes de las 20:30 horas.

offbeat.title: MUTINY- Jason Statham is Ready to Turn the Tide with a New Poster for His Latest Visceral Thriller that Pays Homage to an Action Classic!
offbeat.summary: Jason Statham stars in the upcoming action thriller Mutiny, set to release exclusively in theaters on August 21, 2026. Directed by Jean-François Richet, the film follows Cole Reed, a former Special Forces operative framed for murder after his boss is killed. Reed’s quest for vengeance leads him aboard a cargo ship, uncovering an international conspiracy. The trailer showcases Statham’s signature high-octane action in a confined setting.

offbeat.title: Chi è la single Giulia Colacchi di Tempration Island 2026?
offbeat.summary: Giulia Colacchi, 24 anni, romana, è entrata nel cast delle single di Temptation Island 2026 e ha subito attirato l’attenzione di Danilo, fidanzato da quattro anni con Francesca. Ex finalista regionale a Miss Italia 2025 e modella, Colacchi ha avuto una relazione con il tentatore Igor Zeetti. Le immagini del loro avvicinamento nel villaggio hanno scatenato tensioni tra la coppia. Ora si attende la reazione di Francesca nella prossima puntata.

offbeat.title: Ryanair Spain flight suffers 'technical issue' and met by emergency services
offbeat.summary: A Ryanair flight from Malaga to Edinburgh experienced a minor technical issue, prompting the crew to issue a 7700 emergency code and alerting emergency services on the tarmac. The plane landed safely at Edinburgh Airport on July 22. Passengers disembarked normally and the aircraft was inspected by engineers. The incident is under investigation.

offbeat.title: Musetti, Fils e Draper: ultima chiamata verso New York
offbeat.summary: Three Italian tennis stars—Lorenzo Musetti, Jannik Sinner, and Jack Draper—face crucial matches at the ATP 500 in Washington starting July 27 to secure rankings points before the US Open swing. Musetti, returning after a left thigh injury that forced him to miss Roland Garros and Wimbledon, drops to No. 14 in the ATP rankings. The tournament’s fast hard courts and 30°C heat favor adaptation, but tough opponents like top-10 Alex de Minaur and home favorites Frances Tiafoe await. A strong showing could ease their paths to New York.

offbeat.title: Hiker injured in ‘surprise encounter’ with bear on brushy South Anchorage trail
offbeat.summary: A woman was injured in a bear encounter on a South Anchorage trail on July 18, 2026. The hiker, with another person and three dogs, was on a narrow trail near Bear Valley when a brown bear made brief contact before leaving. First responders used a drone to monitor the bear during the rescue. The woman was hospitalized with non-life-threatening injuries.
sources: ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

offbeat.title: Contact with his agent has begun.. Paris Saint-Germain star is "Al-Hilal's new surprise" in the summer transfer window
offbeat.summary: Al-Hilal has reportedly begun talks with Ousmane Dembélé’s agent about a potential summer transfer. The Saudi Pro League club views the 28-year-old PSG winger as a priority target. PSG aims to retain Dembélé, offering a new contract amid intense Saudi interest. A deal remains uncertain as negotiations progress.

offbeat.title: Man, 30s, dies after being struck by van in Co Kilkenny
offbeat.summary: A man in his 30s died after being struck by a van on the R693 near Arigan Bridge, Cooleshal, Freshford, Co Kilkenny, at 9.30am on Wednesday, 22 July 2026. He was pronounced dead at the scene and taken to University Hospital Waterford for a post-mortem. The road was temporarily closed but has since reopened. Gardaí are appealing for witnesses or dash-cam footage from drivers traveling Freshford to Kilkenny between 9am and 9.30am.

offbeat.title: Incendie d’Arès : 120 sapeurs-pompiers mobilisés dans la nuit de dimanche à lundi, la piste criminelle est envisagée
offbeat.summary: A wildfire broke out in Arès, Gironde, in the early hours of Monday, July 20, 2026, scorching 2.6 hectares of pine forest. Over 120 firefighters responded, preventing further spread to surrounding areas. Investigators suspect arson after identifying multiple ignition points and have launched an inquiry. Authorities continue to assess the damage and potential causes.

offbeat.title: Google earnings live updates: Alphabet's AI outlook, cloud growth in focus
offbeat.summary: Google's parent company Alphabet has increased its 2026 spending forecast to as much as $205 billion, driven by investments in artificial intelligence and cloud growth. This marks a significant jump from previous estimates. Google is also scaling its AI business, dedicating resources to its Gemini 4 model and planning to release new models almost every month. The company's AI outlook and cloud growth are now in focus as it executes on its extraordinary potential.

offbeat.title: World Cup 2026: Argentina react to final defeat and Messi questions
offbeat.summary: Argentina's World Cup campaign ended in a 1-0 defeat to Spain in extra time on Sunday in New Jersey, with midfielder Enzo Fernandez sent off for two yellow cards. The match was marred by ugly scenes, including Fernandez's red card and a brawl. Despite the loss, Fernandez praised the team for representing Argentina with "pride" and "humility". FIFA has launched an investigation into the team's behavior after the final.

offbeat.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
offbeat.summary: Tesla reported weaker-than-expected earnings for the second quarter, with earnings per share at 33 cents adjusted, missing the 51 cents expected by analysts. Revenue reached $28.24 billion, exceeding the $25.71 billion estimate. The company's net income fell 5% to $1.11 billion. Tesla's stock price slid almost 3% in extended trading, following a 17% decline for the year.

offbeat.title: Searle in bid to reach quarter-finals of World Matchplay this evening
offbeat.summary: Tonight, Ryan Searle faces James Wade in Round Two of the World Matchplay at the Winter Gardens in Blackpool. Searle beat William O'Connor 10-6 in the opening round, while Wade won 10-7 against Jermaine Wattimena. The winner will move closer to a potential quarter-final match against World No 1 Luke Littler. Littler is seeking to become the first player since 2017 to win back-to-back titles in Blackpool.

offbeat.title: Has Trump dragged the US into a forever war in Iran? | Mohamad Bazzi
offbeat.summary: A US-Iran ceasefire negotiated by President Trump has collapsed, plunging the region into uncertainty. The agreement, which was reached in November 2024, has failed, raising concerns of a prolonged conflict. The US has been involved in a war with Iran for nearly five months, with no end in sight. The collapse of the ceasefire has significant implications for regional stability and global security.

offbeat.title: CSD gegen Dyke* March, Trans Pride gegen ITP, CSD gegen IQP: Drag March und Nahostkonflikt spalten die Szene
offbeat.summary: A lesbian visibility march, the Dyke March, is facing competition from a rival event, the Drag March, and the Christopher Street Day parade in Berlin. The Dyke March, which has taken place since 2013, is scheduled for Friday evening, while the Drag March and CSD parade will also start on Friday. The Dyke March organizers see the Drag March as an attack on lesbian visibility. The events are expected to draw large crowds in the Kreuzberg neighborhood.

offbeat.title: BBC I, Jack Wright ending explained as season one ends on cliffhanger
offbeat.summary: A murder mystery unfolds in the BBC series I, Jack Wright, as the season one finale ends on a cliffhanger. DCI Morgan charges a suspect in the murder of high-powered businessman Jack Wright, but multiple arrests follow, with all claiming innocence. The final episode reveals a confession from an unlikely candidate. The drama's fate remains uncertain as the season concludes with a series of twists and turns.

offbeat.title: Harcèlement, misogynie : Un labo du CNRS aux pratiques de boys club
offbeat.summary: A French CNRS researcher, Fabien Jobard, has been suspended for five years from the Association française de science politique due to two alleged misconducts related to harassment and sexism. The incidents occurred at the 2024 conference in Grenoble. Jobard, a sociologist studying police behavior, was also the president of the Observatoire français des drogues et des tendances addictives. He will be barred from participating in association events during his suspension.

offbeat.title: Fire kills 10 members of same family in Peru, police say
offbeat.summary: A devastating fire in Lima, Peru, has claimed the lives of 10 members of the same family, including five children, and two others were injured. The blaze occurred at a home in the La Victoria district early Wednesday, with 17 family members present at the time. Five children and four adults were killed, with seven family members managing to escape. Police are investigating reports that the fire was started by arsonists.

offbeat.title: Heatwaves caused by fall in pollution
offbeat.summary: Britain's scorching heatwaves are being driven by a significant drop in pollution, with temperatures in Europe warming twice as much as the rest of the world since the 1980s. The continent is now 2.3C warmer than in the pre-industrial era, with the global average warming by 1.3C. This steep temperature rise has led to an increase in deadly heatwaves. Experts are now studying the link between cleaner skies and the resulting heat increase.

offbeat.title: Conservatives Parrot A Victimhood Script Written By Barack Obama
offbeat.summary: Former US President Barack Obama's campaign speech in Norfolk, Virginia, on November 1, 2025, has been criticized for promoting a victimhood narrative. Obama campaigned for Democratic gubernatorial candidate Abigail Spanberger, who faces Republican candidate Winsome Earle-Sears in the November 4 election. According to reports, Obama's speech was part of a larger effort to mobilize Democratic voters. The outcome of the election will determine the future of Virginia's statewide offices.

offbeat.title: Pogacar fears a day like Adam Yates' at the Tour de France
offbeat.summary: Tadej Pogacar maintained his lead in the general classification at the Tour de France after the 17th stage, where he and teammate Isaac del Toro had few problems. Adam Yates' performance, however, raised concerns as he appeared to come to a complete standstill for a brief moment before teammate Tim Wellens helped him to the finish. Pogacar remains in first place, with del Toro in third. The Slovenian leader will face a challenging stage ahead.

offbeat.title: AD-columnist doet voorspelling en wijst naar PSV: 'Maar het ligt heel dicht bij elkaar'
offbeat.summary: PSV is expected to win its fourth consecutive Dutch league title in the 2026/2027 season, having secured the championship with a record 19-point lead last season. The team's chances are expected to be challenged by Feyenoord, with AD-columnist Hugo Borst predicting a more competitive title race. Maurice Steijn, former coach of Sparta Rotterdam, also expressed confidence in Feyenoord's chances, citing the team's young talent, including Sem Steijn, the son of Maurice. The new season is set to begin with high expectations for both teams.

offbeat.title: Vorschau: Murdoch Mysteries (S09/E09) • Der Baby-Tag (Murdoch Mysteries - Baby Day)
offbeat.summary: Detective William Murdoch takes out a loan to build a house for Julia, but soon discovers that someone has stolen money and printing plates for counterfeit banknotes. The theft threatens to destabilize the economy as the fake bills are nearly indistinguishable from real ones. Inspector Thomas Brackenreid recognizes the severity of the crime's impact on Murdoch's reputation. As Murdoch and his assistant George Crabtree investigate, the circle of suspects tightens.

offbeat.title: The millennial generation has split, new Fed research shows: those over 35 are edging toward boomer-style wealth, while everyone else falls behind
offbeat.summary: According to new research from the Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis, the US homeownership rate has a significant age-based split, with those over 35 edging toward boomer-style wealth, while those under 35 fall behind. The actual homeownership rate is around 53%, compared to the reported 65%. For adults under 35, the true homeownership rate is just 22%. This disparity suggests a widening wealth gap between generations.

offbeat.title: Microsoft brings original Xbox backward compatibility to Windows PCs
offbeat.summary: Microsoft is expanding its Xbox backward compatibility to Windows PCs, with four original Xbox titles now playable on PC for the first time. The titles, including BLiNX: The Time Sweeper and Conker: Live and Reloaded, are available for download at $10 or for free with an Xbox Game Pass subscription. PC players can also access the games with existing digital licenses. This move enables bonus graphical features like Vsync support and up to 4x resolution scaling.

offbeat.title: ISPs' long nightmare of having to list all the fees they charge is finally over
offbeat.summary: The Federal Communications Commission has eliminated a requirement for internet service providers to list all additional fees on their broadband price labels. This change affects over 700 internet service providers. The FCC cited concerns that cluttered labels were no longer serving as a useful shopping tool. The decision is effective immediately, allowing ISPs to simplify their billing practices.

entertainment.title: Hello Sunshine’s Head of TV and Film on 10 Years of Reese Witherspoon’s Production Company, ‘Big Little Lies’ Season 3, Apple’s ‘Lucky’ and More ‘Elle’
entertainment.summary: Reese Witherspoon's production company, Hello Sunshine, is releasing two high-profile shows in quick succession. A prequel series "Elle" to "Legally Blonde" is debuting on Amazon's Prime Video in July, while the action miniseries "Lucky" starring Anya Taylor-Joy will premiere on Apple TV. Both shows are produced by Hello Sunshine. The back-to-back releases mark a significant milestone for the company.

entertainment.title: ‘The Odyssey’ Screenplay Is Now Available to Buy Online
entertainment.summary: Christopher Nolan's screenplay for "The Odyssey" is now available for purchase online, priced at $13.95 for a 240-page paperback. The film, which stars Matt Damon, has collected $124.5 million domestically and $264.1 million worldwide since its release. The screenplay offers a closer look at Nolan's adaptation of Homer's Greek poem, including dialogue and scene descriptions. The official release date is August 4.

entertainment.title: Darren Aronofsky’s AI Studio Primordial Soup Raising $15 Million
entertainment.summary: Darren Aronofsky's AI studio Primordial Soup is seeking to raise $15 million in cash through a Securities and Exchange Commission filing. The studio, launched a year ago, has already sold over $11 million in equity this month. As part of its expansion, Primordial Soup is hiring a "Head of Studio" and multiple "Generative Artists" to work on AI-focused projects. The studio's efforts underscore Aronofsky's ambitions in the AI space, following its partnership with Google's DeepMind unit to produce short films.

breaking.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
breaking.summary: The US has signed a landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia, allowing the kingdom to enrich uranium on its soil at a US-built facility. The deal, worth billions of dollars, will advance US and regional security by upholding high nuclear safety and nonproliferation standards. The agreement will involve US companies building a facility to produce enriched uranium, which can be used as fuel for power plants. The deal is expected to strengthen the US's competitive edge in civil nuclear technology.

breaking.title: Louvre Gallery Reopens After Brazen Jewel Heist
breaking.summary: Thieves stole crown jewels from the Apollo Gallery at the Louvre Museum in October, forcing its closure. Tourists finally returned on Wednesday.

breaking.title: Three Airports Plan to Ditch T.S.A. Amid Push for Private Security
breaking.summary: The airports have opted in to the agency’s new security model, an agency spokesperson confirmed on Wednesday. A union official said the move could jeopardize public safety.

sports.title: Liverpool confident of signing Barcola - Thursday's gossip
sports.summary: Liverpool is confident of signing Paris St-Germain forward Bradley Barcola, a 23-year-old who impressed with four goal contributions at the World Cup with France this summer. The Reds aim to beat Arsenal and Bayern Munich to the signature. Barcola's potential move to Liverpool comes as Arsenal is also interested in the player. A decision on the transfer is expected in the coming weeks.

sports.title: Miami mistakenly post James 'introductory' video
sports.summary: Miami Heat mistakenly posted a link to LeBron James' introductory press conference on YouTube, scheduled for July 27, before deleting it. The error occurred as staff prepared for the possibility of James joining the team. James, a 41-year-old 22-time All-Star, is considering a return to the Heat after leaving the Los Angeles Lakers in June. The team is looking to bolster its lineup with James alongside new signings Giannis Antetokounmpo and Bam Adebayo.

sports.title: Captain Salt leads Fire to victory against Brave
sports.summary: Welsh Fire captain Phil Salt led his team to a six-wicket victory against Southern Brave in Southampton, scoring an unbeaten 47. This win marks the beginning of the 2026 Hundred season for Fire, who finished bottom of the table last season. Salt is the all-time leading scorer in The Hundred, having hit 1,138 runs in five seasons. Fire will look to build momentum in their title bid.

tech.title: Alphabet Quadruples Profit to Nearly $120 Billion, Fueled by A.I. Investments
tech.summary: Alphabet, parent company of Google, reported a record profit of nearly $120 billion for the three months ending in June, a 24 percent increase from the previous year. The surge is largely attributed to investments in artificial intelligence, with Google's cloud business seeing an 82 percent revenue growth to $24.8 billion. This quadrupled Alphabet's profit to $112.1 billion, fueled by investments in A.I.-related companies like SpaceX and Anthropic. The company's A.I. investments are expected to continue driving growth in the coming months.

tech.title: Tesla’s revenues are bouncing back, but profits are still weak
tech.summary: Tesla reported a 25 percent increase in vehicle deliveries to 480,126 units in the second quarter of 2026, exceeding revenue expectations with $28.2 billion in revenue. The company's net income was $1.11 billion, a 5 percent increase from the same period last year. Despite this, profits remain weak compared to revenue growth. Tesla's focus on delivering vehicles will likely continue as it aims to transform into a leader in AI and robotics.

tech.title: Price-hiked iPads are a little cheaper right now
tech.summary: A premium iPad model is currently discounted at various retailers. The 13-inch iPad Pro M5 with 512GB of storage is available for $1,549.99, a $150 savings from its original price of $1,699. Additionally, the 11-inch iPad Air M3 with 1TB of storage and optional 5G is marked down to $749, a $500 discount from its suggested retail price.

politics.title: House Republicans Pass Stock Trading Bill Tied to SAVE Act and Voter ID Measure
politics.summary: The measure has drawn bipartisan backing amid a public outcry against the practice, but Democrats opposed it after Republicans added a voter ID requirement.

politics.title: House Adopts $95 Billion G.O.P. Budget for Iran War
politics.summary: Republican leaders muscled through resistance in their own ranks to approve the budget blueprint, but its prospects were far dimmer in the Senate.

politics.title: House Passes Defense Bill Amid Iran War Divide
politics.summary: Republicans pushed through the $1.15 trillion bill over opposition from Democrats, who said backing it was akin to embracing the war.

facts.title: NASA to Showcase Agency’s Newest Wind Tunnel in Virginia
facts.summary: NASA will showcase its newest wind tunnel, the Flight Dynamics Research Facility, at the Langley Research Center in Hampton, Virginia, on July 31. The facility is the agency's first new wind tunnel in over 40 years. The event will include a ribbon-cutting ceremony and media availability with NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman and other officials. The wind tunnel is a major milestone in NASA's evolution and will be used for research and development.

facts.title: What Were the Lotus-Eaters Eating?
facts.summary: In Homer’s epic, Odysseus’s men eat something so powerful that they forget about home. Which plants could have produced such a soporific, narcotic and amnesiac effect?

crisis.title: Donald Trump Jr.’s Investment Firm Posts Staggering Returns of 200%
crisis.summary: The fledgling firm, run by the president’s oldest son and his partner Omeed Malik, has made investments in A.I. and defense technology that have tripled in value in just months.

crisis.title: Global Oil Price Jumps as War Threats Intensify
crisis.summary: But stock investors shrug off Iran developments as they await crucial earnings reports from tech firms including Alphabet and Tesla.

health.title: Target ultra-processed food to reduce obesity in Britain | Letter
health.summary: A British health select committee report finds that obesity is an engineered outcome, not a result of individual willpower. The report highlights a flaw in decades of British food policy, specifically the "high in fat, salt or sugar" framework, which unfairly targets fat as a primary driver of weight gain and type 2 diabetes. The evidence suggests sugar and refined carbohydrates are the main culprits, with salt playing a secondary role. The committee recommends targeting ultra-processed foods to reduce obesity in Britain.

health.title: Government Overhauls Teen Pregnancy Program to Focus on Marriage and Starting Families
health.summary: The administration canceled federal grants to organizations across the country, accusing them of encouraging premarital sex. New criteria say programs should stress abstinence.
